biological_rationale: Elevated in MS CSF; mitochondrial OxPhos impairment in oligodendrocytes; glycolytic compensation for energy deficit
verification_notes: Cocco 2016 (plasma glucose lower in MS, 1H-NMR) and Kim 2017 (CSF glucose lower in MS/NMOSD).

biological_rationale: Reduced in RRMS serum; mTORC1-mediated oligodendrocyte remyelination requires BCAA; deficiency correlates with fatigue
verification_notes: Kim 2017 (CSF valine altered in MS relapse vs remission); Yang 2021 (plasma valine altered in Chinese MS cohort).

biological_rationale: Folate cycle impairment; mitochondrial complex I inhibition; convergent with L-Methionine (rank 16) on one-carbon axis
verification_notes: Kim 2017 (CSF formate higher in MS) and Alwahsh 2024 (serum formate higher in MS).

biological_rationale: Aconitase inhibition by lesion-derived ROS; TCA cycle flux impairment; mitochondrial distress marker in progressive MS
verification_notes: Kim 2017 (CSF citrate lower in MS) and Gebregiworgis 2016 (urinary citrate altered in MS).

biological_rationale: Clostridiales-mediated phenylalanine-glycine conjugation; reduced in MS reflects gut dysbiosis; microbiome-immune axis
verification_notes: Gebregiworgis 2016, urinary metabolic signature study: hippurate altered in MS vs healthy controls.

biological_rationale: Elevated CSF lactate; anaerobic glycolysis in hypoxic lesion microenvironments; astrocyte-neuron shuttle disruption
verification_notes: Amorini 2014, serum lactate proposed as biomarker in MS (elevated vs healthy).

biological_rationale: Loss of GABAergic interneurons in MS cortex; spasticity and cortical excitability; CNS-specific fingerprint
verification_notes: Cawley 2015: reduced GABA (MRS) associated with physical disability in progressive MS.

biological_rationale: Neuroprotective amino sulphonic acid; reduced in MS brain tissue; anti-neuroinflammatory in EAE models
Elevated choline:creatine on MRS = validated demyelination biomarker; myelin membrane phospholipid precursor
verification_notes: Cocco 2016: plasma choline higher in MS patients (1H-NMR metabolomic profile).

biological_rationale: Anti-inflammatory SCFA; HDAC inhibition; Treg induction; RCT of propionate supplementation in RRMS supports this axis
verification_notes: Duscha 2020 (Cell): propionate shapes MS disease course/immunomodulation; Chinese cohort study: fecal propionate depleted in MS.

biological_rationale: Gluconeogenic amino acid; altered nitrogen metabolism in MS; links to muscle wasting and fatigue
verification_notes: Cocco 2016 (plasma alanine higher in MS) and Gebregiworgis 2016 (urinary alanine altered in MS).

biological_rationale: Elevated CSF; xanthine oxidase ROS contribute to oligodendrocyte death; oxidative stress-driven purine recycling failure
verification_notes: Tavazzi 2011: serum hypoxanthine/oxypurines increased in MS patients (energy metabolism impairment).

biological_rationale: Elevated in MS serum; dysregulated phenylalanine hydroxylase in neuroinflammation; aromatic AA transporter competition
verification_notes: Gebregiworgis 2016: urinary phenylalanine altered in MS vs healthy controls.

biological_rationale: IDO1 catabolism produces neurotoxic quinolinate; kynurenine:tryptophan ratio is a validated MS disease activity marker
verification_notes: Lim 2017: kynurenine-pathway/tryptophan metabolism linked to MS progression; Cocco 2016: plasma tryptophan altered in MS.

biological_rationale: Anomeric form; glycolytic flux perturbations; internally consistent with rank-1 D-Glucose energy axis
verification_notes: Same evidence base as D-Glucose (Cocco 2016); alpha-anomer is the same underlying serum glucose signal measured by NMR.

biological_rationale: SAM-dependent methylation of myelin basic protein; MBP hypomethylation in progressive MS; one-carbon convergence
verification_notes: Singhal 2018: dysregulation of methionine metabolism in MS (serum/CSF).

biological_rationale: Gut microbiome SCFA; HDAC inhibitor; promotes Treg differentiation; convergent with Propionic acid (rank 10)
verification_notes: Chinese cohort study: fecal/serum short-chain fatty acid (incl. butyrate) depletion in MS vs healthy controls.

biological_rationale: Collagen metabolism and ECM remodelling; astrogliosis in MS lesion areas; proline-rich proteins in glial scarring
verification_notes: Alwahsh 2024: serum proline altered between MS subtypes/vs controls (NMR-based).

biological_rationale: mTORC1 activator; oligodendrocyte differentiation and remyelination; BCAA convergence with L-Valine (rank 2)
verification_notes: 2024 ACS Chem Neurosci study: leucine altered across CSF/serum/urine in progressive MS.

biological_rationale: Glycine precursor; gut microbiome-dependent catabolism; reduced in MS; intestinal permeability and gut dysbiosis
verification_notes: Alwahsh 2024: threonine-related metabolic pathway (glycine/serine/threonine metabolism) significantly altered in MS serum; pathway-level rather than a study isolating threonine alone.
